# Eligibility criteria based on income-to-rent ratio and other factors
        # Define income-to-rent ratio threshold (e.g., rent should not exceed 30% of monthly income)
        monthly_income = self.annual_income / 12
        rent_burden_ratio = self.monthly_rent / monthly_income
        
        # Base eligibility on rent burden and employment/student status
        if rent_burden_ratio > 0.3:
            if self.employment_status in ['employed', 'student']:
                return True
            elif self.employment_status == 'unemployed' and self.age >= 60:
                return True
        return False
